prompt: Striking 3D neon-tube sign logo on pure white background, bright and airy. The word wslo in lowercase formed by glass neon tubes filled with glowing gas, soft purple (#8B5CF6) glow at W transitioning through indigo (#6366F1) at S and L to teal (#2DD4BF) glow at O. The letter O is a gear cog shape, same neon tube material, with visible glass tube forming the gear teeth, glowing teal. Below wslo, the word lab in smaller matching neon tube style, centered, in soft violet (#8B5CF6) neon glow. Soft colored light spill on white surface beneath — purple on the left, teal on the right. Elegant and luminous on white. Like a premium lab neon sign photographed in a bright white gallery. Professional brand identity. Clean white background.
negative_prompt: busy background, particles, icons, neural network, circuit, flat 2D, over-blown neon, harsh glare, cluttered, blurry, watermark, black background, dark background, cheap, matte, orange, red, yellow, green, grey background

settings.style: Neon tube sign on white bg with logo 36 palette
